block.text: You examine the smashed robot. Inside, you see its pilot; he does not appear to be wounded. But as you reach a metal claw towards his bubble, he stabs at a control. His machine self-destructs! Your own robot is thrown back several metres and you are shaken up: lose 2 ARMOUR points and 2 STAMINA points. If your ARMOUR has been reduced to o, turn to 61. Otherwise, Turn to 65.

choice.text: If your ARMOUR has been reduced to o.
